title: Analyze shapes by angles
description: Practice analyzing a shape by counting the number of angles.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How many angles does a triangle have?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's draw a triangle!

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c33bd3b56817b15cf9b2fe76acf10a0290d015d8)

How many angles are there?

There are $3$ angles.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/05ec3506d210d6474c223ba3f69591e738215556)
A triangle has $3$ angles.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How many angles does a square have?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's draw a square!

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6fd0398b93e38f446d18f9ce8f8800898f0dc32d)

How many angles are there?

There are $4$ angles.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b3b539637d2dfce90a3678d4a94a0498ccc04cfc)
A square has $4$ angles.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How many angles does an octagon have?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's draw an octagon!

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/12c7d4228158e966fa75380bf22dd05297f331e2)

How many angles are there?

There are $8$ angles.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3014c2334c1c5ad41b617ce841d448c5e9df92d2)
An octagon has $8$ angles.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How many angles does a trapezoid have?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's draw a trapezoid!

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e57089ef2e6dabff3d656ea38140a4baa58039f1)

How many angles are there?

There are $4$ angles.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/246bf0282cf2b1993f51e58af2d9ce160d11e185)
A trapezoid has $4$ angles.
Let's draw a picture of each shape.

Shape | Picture | Number of angles
:- | :-: | :-:
Octagon | ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c5eec10a0d0edd79c284559d69ca9ba81e6c93cf) | $8$ angles
Hexagon | ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3ce9c85a260a5d5642611093fbccecf56ebadace) | $6$ angles
Pentagon | ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f5148ad8f3db0ba09576f1fb0767364933615ba8) | $5$ angles

Which shape has $6$ angles?
A **hexagon** has $6$ angles.
Let's draw a picture of each shape.

Shape | Picture | Number of angles
:- | :-: | :-:
Square | ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/584c406367587ddf123d3dff6ed71f7e6933802e) | $4$ angles
Triangle | ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ec69ddffdce76203eafdfa786b32d25ae59d279f) | $3$ angles
Rectangle | ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6e5b0dd8706ec81422c1daf3b05b9b056c4eca2c) | $4$ angles

Which shape has $3$ angles?
A **triangle** has $3$ angles.
Let's draw a picture of each shape.

Shape | Picture | Number of angles
:- | :-: | :-:
Pentagon | ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f5148ad8f3db0ba09576f1fb0767364933615ba8) | $5$ angles
Hexagon | ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3ce9c85a260a5d5642611093fbccecf56ebadace) | $6$ angles
Trapezoid |  ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5cbc5c3ca09d25683feec9ece237b96c2e9a7dbf) | $4$ angles

Which shape has $5$ angles?
A **pentagon** has $5$ angles.
Let's draw a picture of each shape.

Shape | Picture | Number of angles
:- | :-: | :-:
Triangle | ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ec69ddffdce76203eafdfa786b32d25ae59d279f) | $3$ angles
Trapezoid |  ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5cbc5c3ca09d25683feec9ece237b96c2e9a7dbf) | $4$ angles
Octagon | ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c5eec10a0d0edd79c284559d69ca9ba81e6c93cf) | $8$ angles

Which shape has $4$ angles?
A **trapezoid** has $4$ angles.
Let's count the number of angles on each shape.

This shape has $5$ angles.

![A shape with 5 sides. It has 5 angles numbered 1 through 5.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/497c48403d536b7d5a8fced1e413a42b441f7e0c)

This shape has $3$ angles.

![A shape with 3 sides. It has 3 angles numbered 1 through 3.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a145dff20209d59c360a8f12014a630ffb009fe1)

This shape has $4$ angles.

![A shape with 4 sides. It has 4 angles numbered 1 through 4.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f4f989b9bc2d61fd076c050b32d5ea794ec72276)

Here is the shape that has $4$ angles:

![A shape with 4 angles. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ecde64994ef2479aa9414f3970f1a0b49e34ed67)
Let's count the number of angles on each shape.

This shape has $5$ angles.

![A shape with 5 sides. It has 5 angles numbered 1 through 5.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fe04cc25d5bc29ba148b7a96198d562716269134)

This shape has $6$ angles.

![A shape with 6 sides. It has 6 angles numbered 1 through 6.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4bb09e0fa4fdb472962a4dd77c9f49682495b6ea)

This shape has $4$ angles.

![A shape with 4 sides. It has 4 angles numbered 1 through 4.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5a8c4459d757ea85107523f1a17380adf46578a5)

Here is the shape that has $4$ angles:

![A shape with 4 angles. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d4528426bd538346baec80023f5ecf6bca469c85)
Let's count the number of angles on each shape.

This shape has $7$ angles.

![A shape with 7 sides. It has 7 angles numbered 1 through 7.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/46ea95ab21e7f66f65e5dcd9b73ceededffe15f8)

This shape has $6$ angles.

![A shape with 6 sides. It has 6 angles numbered 1 through 6.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d4e52705750b2e15b6dcef89e09bb6bb024b5ad7)

This shape has $8$ angles.

![A shape with 8 sides. It has 8 angles numbered 1 through 8. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f49cb4ae9f57d72b3e425de5dd4e5523411bf427)

Here is the shape that has $8$ angles:

![A shape with 8 sides.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f05fad9572a5bfd36ba436dadcb862288639de6b)
Let's count the number of angles on each shape.

This shape has $4$ angles.

![A shape with 4 sides. It has 4 angles numbered 1 through 4.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/07bb3ade2ec4d8c6d6c520626625ba48499eb401)

This shape has $3$ angles.

![A shape with 3 sides. It has 3 angles numbered 1 through 3.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e7ad105821f8098536ffb550f2d710998c1071ed)

This shape has $5$ angles.

![A shape with 5 sides. It has 5 angles numbered 1 through 5.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c5b3d559115818da3bcf1f90a275d36bf8ff4e05)

Here is the shape that has $5$ angles:

![A shape with 5 sides. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f599423808cbe9861f2175f7eaaa31218b24c181)
